data.title: Apogee Enterprises Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: APOG) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on May 28, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026. Apogee Enterprises, Inc. is a key player in architectural building products and services, along with high-performance coated materials for various applications.

data.title: PulteGroup, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Atlanta-based PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE: PHM) released its financial outcomes for Q1 of 2026, concluding on March 31. The firm disclosed a net income of $347 million, translating to $1.79 per share. This marks a decline from the previous year's $523 million net income, equivalent to $2.57 per share. Despite the decrease, PulteGroup remains focused on responding to market demands efficiently, optimizing its assets, and achieving robust returns during these challenging market conditions.

data.title: Energy Fuels Announces Call Details for Q1-2026 Earnings
data.description: Energy Fuels Inc., a prominent U.S. company specializing in uranium, rare earth elements, and critical materials, has announced that they will conduct a conference call and webcast on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 9:00 AM MT. The call will be held in Denver and will be available for participation by shareholders and interested parties. Energy Fuels Inc. is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol UUUU and on the TSX as EFR. This event is significant for investors and industry followers looking to gain insights into the company's operations and future prospects.

data.title: Aliphatic Hydrocarbon Solvents & Thinners Market worth $6.81 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on April 23, 2026, a report from MarketsandMarkets revealed insights on the Aliphatic Hydrocarbon Solvents and Thinners Market. The market includes various types such as Varnish Makers' & Painters' Naphtha, Mineral Spirits, and Hexane, utilized in applications like Paints & Coatings, Cleaning & Degreasing, Adhesives, Rubbers, etc. Key data and trends on this market segment were shared, providing valuable information for businesses and stakeholders.

data.description: In New York on April 23, 2026, Travelzoo® reported a 5% increase in revenue to $24.3 million compared to the previous year. The company achieved a consolidated operating profit of $3.4 million and a non-GAAP consolidated operating profit of $3.5 million. Cash flow from operations amounted to $3.9 million. data.title: Property Management Software Market Growth to Reach USD 7.8 Billion by 2033, at a CAGR 8.9% | Allied Market Research
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, as of April 23, 2026, there has been a substantial rise in the real estate sector driven by the rapid uptake of cloud services, the increasing prevalence of Software as a Service (SaaS) platforms, and the incorporation of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning in real estate processes on a worldwide scale. The market, valued at USD 3.2 billion in 2023, has witnessed significant growth due to these factors.

data.title: So-Young International Inc. Files Its Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On April 23, 2026, So-Young International Inc. (Nasdaq: SY), a prominent aesthetic treatment platform in China facilitating online services and offline treatments, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F.

data.title: Lockheed Martin Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: The Orion spacecraft has accomplished a milestone journey around the moon, marking a significant achievement. Lockheed Martin and the Department of Defense have entered into multiyear agreements to enhance the production of munitions. This collaboration underscores a commitment to bolster national defense capabilities. The company reported impressive financial figures, with sales totaling $18.0 billion and net earnings of $1.5 billion, equivalent to $6.44 per share. Furthermore, cash flow from operations amounted to $220 million, showcasing robust financial performance.

data.title: Best Gatlinburg Vacation Packages: Westgate Resorts Recognized for Water Park Access and Affordability by Expert Consumers
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 23, 2026, Expert Consumers has bestowed recognition upon Westgate Resorts for its exceptional contribution to crafting top-quality vacation packages in Gatlinburg. Situated in Tennessee, Westgate Resorts has been praised for delivering meticulously planned travel experiences that cater to a variety of preferences. The acknowledgment emphasizes the company's dedication to offering structured and diverse vacation options for travelers in the region.

data.title: Trading Academy® Launches Advanced Hedge Fund Strategies and Tactics Program, Bridging Institutional Theory with Live Capital Experience
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Irvine, California, Trading Academy® introduced its newest program, Advanced Hedge Fund Strategies and Tactics. This program offers an immersive learning experience for students, focusing on providing them with the necessary skills, tools, and real-world experience to excel in the financial industry. The program aims to equip students with advanced knowledge in hedge fund strategies and tactics to thrive in institutional environments.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp. Commences Trading on the OTCQX Best Market in the United States
data.description: Hemlo Mining Corp. (TSX.V: HMMC) is excited to share that their OTCQX trading as HMMCF is progressing, aligning with their plan to expand investor reach and boost trading liquidity throughout North American capital markets. data.title: CGI implements multi-agent AI solution for SOK Finance to accelerate financial service operations
data.description: CGI, listed as GIB.A on the TSX and GIB on the NYSE, announced a new solution involving AI and AWS Bedrock to manage high-volume financial customer service requests for the S Group. This initiative, launched in Helsinki on April 23, 2026, aims to enhance operations and efficiency in handling customer queries.

data.title: Baker Hughes Likely To Report Lower Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Oilfield services company Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Thursday, April 23. Analysts predict earnings of 49 cents per share, a decline from the 51 cents per share reported last year. The expected quarterly revenue is $6.33 billion, slightly lower than the previous year's $6.43 billion. Recently, Baker Hughes agreed to sell its Waygate Technologies business to Hexagon (OTC: HXGBY) for about $1.45 billion in cash. The company's stock rose by 3.8% to $62.54 at the close of trading on Wednesday. For further details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: Spectrum Brands Holdings to Report Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Financial Results and Hold Conference Call and Webcast on May 7, 2026
data.description: Middleton, Wisconsin-based Spectrum Brands Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPB) revealed plans to unveil its fiscal 2026 second quarter financial results for the period concluding on March 29, 2026, prior to the market opening on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The company, a prominent global provider of branded consumer products and home essentials, is dedicated to fostering innovation and delivering exceptional customer service. A live conference call and webcast are scheduled by Spectrum Brands for May 7, 2026, at 9:00 AM.
